  "findings": [
    "Isolated metal parts on the production floor are not properly bonded, creating a shock and electrocution hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize nearby electrical circuits if necessary, and install compliant bonding jumpers to connect all isolated metal parts to the equipment grounding conductor system."
  ],
  "rationale": "Isolated metal parts that are likely to become energized must be bonded to the equipment grounding conductor or source grounding system to ensure a low-impedance path for fault current, preventing dangerous touch-potential hazards.",

  ]
